metaTitle: Boiler Service in London | Annual Boiler Checks
metaDescription: Book a boiler service in London with a Gas Safe engineer. Annual servicing helps spot wear, safety issues and efficiency problems before they become breakdowns.
intro: Regular boiler servicing helps keep your heating system safer, more efficient and less likely to fail without warning. We provide boiler service visits across London for homes and rental properties.
pricingGuidance: Boiler service pricing starts from a standard annual service visit, with any repair work or additional parts quoted separately if faults are found.
localProof: Booked by homeowners, landlords and managing agents who want annual servicing recorded properly and explained clearly.

sections.heading: What a boiler service is for
sections.body: A service is not just a tick-box visit. It is the point where wear, pressure issues, combustion concerns and poor system performance are picked up before they turn into breakdowns.

sections.heading: What is checked during a service
sections.body: The exact checks depend on the appliance, but a service usually includes visual inspection, operational checks and safety-focused testing around the boiler and its controls.
bullets: Boiler condition and signs of leaks
Combustion and flue-related checks where required

sections.heading: Who should book annual servicing
sections.body: Annual servicing is sensible for owner-occupied homes, rental properties and any boiler that is heavily used through the colder months.
